lint.notes: Lint passed. Some packages do not define lint script (expected for example plugins)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: When implementing swipe/decision actions that update counts or state, add idempotency checks to prevent duplicate events from double-counting. For example, recordSwipe should reject already-decided ideas rather than creating duplicate SwipeEvent records.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature research-ideas-and-learning-signals allows re-swiping already-decided ideas, creating duplicate SwipeEvent records and double-incrementing preference profile counts.
